ticket.description:
HI Team,
We have wanted you to remove price sof all items on the Picking Slip since Last Year 2025.
But we were sent going round in circles and never got to removing the prices of items on our Picking Slip.  
Can someone please, please, please help us resolve this ASAP?
my customers are complaining because they want to give the items as gifts and they do not want the price of the items printed on the picking slip. 
Appreciate your kind prompt response.
Looking forward to quick resolution on his.
Thanks very much
Lawrence

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/views/orders/status/allorders

comments.body:
Hi Lawrence,

I'm truly sorry for the frustration this has caused and for the time it has taken to get a proper resolution. You've been patient, and you deserve a clear answer.

The good news is the app does support custom Packing Slip templates, which is exactly the feature we need to use to remove item prices from the document going forward. By using a custom template, we can configure what information appears on the Picking Slip — and specifically exclude the item price field so it does not show for your gift recipients.

However, setting up the custom template correctly requires a bit of hands-on configuration, and I don't want to send you in circles with written steps again. The fastest way to get this fully resolved for you today is to jump on a quick screen-share call where we can walk through the template setup together and confirm it is working before we finish.

Could you please let us know a time that works for you in the next day or two? Alternatively, if you can share a screenshot of the Picking Slip as it currently prints, we can confirm which specific document and template is being used and give you the most direct steps possible.

We want this resolved for you — for real this time.

Thanks,
PluginHive Support
comments.html_body:
Hi Lawrence,
 
I'm truly sorry for the frustration this has caused and for the time it has taken to get a proper resolution. You've been patient, and you deserve a clear answer.
 
The good news is the app does support custom Packing Slip templates, which is exactly the feature we need to use to remove item prices from the document going forward. By using a custom template, we can configure what information appears on the Picking Slip — and specifically exclude the item price field so it does not show for your gift recipients.
 
However, setting up the custom template correctly requires a bit of hands-on configuration, and I don't want to send you in circles with written steps again. The fastest way to get this fully resolved for you today is to jump on a quick screen-share call where we can walk through the template setup together and confirm it is working before we finish.
 
Could you please let us know a time that works for you in the next day or two? Alternatively, if you can share a screenshot of the Picking Slip as it currently prints, we can confirm which specific document and template is being used and give you the most direct steps possible.
 
We want this resolved for you — for real this time.
 
Thanks,
PluginHive Support

comments.body:
Hello Lawrence, Thank you for reaching out with your case. I would like to share that it is possible to remove the item prices from the Packing Slips generated from the app for your orders. You will have to use the Custom Packing Slip template to achieve this requirement. Currently, you are using a pre-defined Packing Slip template in the App. To use the Custom Packing Slip template, navigate to App > Menu > Settings > General Settings > Shipping > Set the **Packing Slip Template** as **Custom Template**. Once done, Edit the Packing Slip Template and remove the below code line from the template code at line 165, 166 - _
_ _ _ Once done, Save the template and try generating label for a new order to check the Packing Slip generated. If needed, we can also setup a Zoom call to go over this together. You can **CLICK HERE** to schedule the call as per your availability. Looking forward to your response. Thanks and Regards, Touseef Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Lawrence,
 
Thank you for reaching out with your case.
 
I would like to share that it is possible to remove the item prices from the Packing Slips generated from the app for your orders.
 
You will have to use the Custom Packing Slip template to achieve this requirement.
 
Currently, you are using a pre-defined Packing Slip template in the App. To use the Custom Packing Slip template, navigate to App > Menu > Settings > General Settings > Shipping > Set the Packing Slip Template as Custom Template.
 
Once done, Edit the Packing Slip Template and remove the below code line from the template code at line 165, 166 -
<div class="item-price"> </div>
  </div>
 
Once done, Save the template and try generating label for a new order to check the Packing Slip generated.
 
If needed, we can also setup a Zoom call to go over this together. You can CLICK HERE to schedule the call as per your availability.
 
Looking forward to your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
